step_rationale: Anticoagulant factor; modifies stroke and thrombotic risk in Type 1 MI.
mechanism: Protein Z is a vitamin K-dependent anticoagulant that influences coagulation balance and thrombotic risk.

references.title: Loss of function in protein Z (PROZ) is associated with increased risk of ischemic stroke in the UK Biobank.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
